title: Artifact tree section component with drag-and-drop support
purpose: Renders a collapsible tree section with optional drag-and-drop functionality for artifact management.
module_context: Exports a React component named ArtifactTreeSection that accepts various props including title, count, collapse state, and drag handlers.

steps.content: Extract all props from the input object including title, count, collapse state, and handlers.
Determine the effective collapse state by checking if the section is collapsed and not forced to be expanded.
Initialize a state variable to track whether the section is currently being dragged over.
Set up drag event handlers for over, leave, and drop if onDrop handler is provided.
Determine the appropriate ring class based on drop hint or drag over state.
Render the section header with toggle button and optional count display.
Render the children content only if the section is not collapsed.
Check if the dragged data contains files.
IF files are present, set the drag over state to true.
Clear the drag over state when the user drags away from the section.
Reset the drag over state after a drop occurs.
Extract files from the dropped data transfer object.
IF files are present, invoke the onDrop handler with the extracted files.
